title: Top UFO Expert Reveals Who Holds The SECRETS In The Government
summary: A discussion about the compartmentalization of UAP/UFO secrets within the US government, focusing on how classified information may have been transferred through the Manhattan Project to the Atomic Energy Commission and Department of Energy, with separate clearance systems that prevent even top-secret cleared Pentagon officials from accessing certain programs.

key_claims.claim: The Manhattan Project may have had custody of UAP-related secrets which then transferred to the Atomic Energy Commission and subsequently to the Department of Energy
The Department of Energy has its own separate line of clearances distinct from Pentagon clearances
People with Above Top Secret clearances at the Pentagon have never heard of certain programs because they lack the specific atomic/energy-related clearances
